# ngrok_kubernetes_operator (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Kubernetes Operator by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this Kubernetes Operator.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the Kubernetes Operator was created. RFC 3339 format.
- `deployment` (Attributes) Information about the deployment of this Kubernetes Operator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment))
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of this Kubernetes Operator.
- `enabled_features` (List of String) Features enabled for this Kubernetes Operator (e.g. bindings, ingress, gateway).
- `metadata` (String) Arbitrary user-defined machine-readable data of this Kubernetes Operator.
- `region` (String) The ngrok region in which the ingress for this operator is served.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the Kubernetes Operator was last updated. RFC 3339 format.
- `uri` (String) URI of this Kubernetes Operator API resource.

<a id="nestedatt--deployment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deployment`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_name` (String) User-given name for the cluster the Kubernetes Operator is deployed to.
- `name` (String) The deployment name.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace this Kubernetes Operator is deployed to.
- `version` (String) The version of this Kubernetes Operator.
